mapper.select:
SELECT BOOKSTORE_IDX, LOAN_SEQ, LOAN_NAME, TITLE, REGIST_NUM, CLAIM_SIGN, ADD_ID, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE FROM BOOK_STORE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} like '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
ORDER BY ADD_DATE DESC
SELECT BOOKSTORE_IDX, LOAN_SEQ, LOAN_NAME, TITLE, REGIST_NUM, CLAIM_SIGN, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE FROM BOOK_STORE WHERE BOOKSTORE_IDX = #{bookstore_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK_STORE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND LOAN_SEQ = #{loan_seq} AND LOAN_NAME = #{loan_name} AND TITLE = #{title} AND REGIST_NUM = #{regist_num} AND CLAIM_SIGN = #{claim_sign}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK_STORE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} like '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK_STORE_REQ WHERE LOAN_SEQ = #{loan_seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK_STORE SET loan_seq = #{loan_seq}, loan_name = #{loan_name}, title = #{title}, regist_num = #{regist_num}, claim_sign = #{claim_sign}, modify_id = #{add_id}, modify_date = sysdate WHERE bookstore_idx = #{bookstore_idx}
UPDATE BOOK_STORE SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE bookstore_idx = #{bookstore_idx}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK_STORE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND LOAN_SEQ = #{loan_seq}
AND ${search_type} like '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
